title: Demo Endpoint Safety Guard / Startup Warning
context: External security review flagged that GRANTLAYER_ENABLE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS=true combined with a non-local host binding (e.g. 0.0.0.0) could expose demo endpoints to non-local network interfaces without a startup-level block. The GL-089 startup gate only checks RUNTIME_MODE, not the actual host bind address. GL-190 adds a mode-independent guard based on host binding.
implemented_behavior: config.demo_endpoint_public_exposure_errors(host) is called from server.run() before the server binds. If ENABLE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS is true, the effective host is non-local, and GRANTLAYER_ALLOW_PUBLIC_DEMO_ENDPOINTS is not set, startup is aborted with a safe deterministic error. The check runs regardless of RUNTIME_MODE.

config_flags.GRANTLAYER_ENABLE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS: bool, default false — enables demo-only endpoints
config_flags.GRANTLAYER_ALLOW_PUBLIC_DEMO_ENDPOINTS: bool, default false — explicit acknowledgement to allow demo endpoints on non-local host

unsafe_nonlocal_behavior: startup aborted with SystemExit(1) and safe error message; server never binds

explicit_acknowledgement.behavior: allows demo endpoints on non-local host when deliberately set

covers: demo endpoints disabled — always safe
demo endpoints enabled on localhost — allowed
demo endpoints enabled on 127.0.0.1 — allowed
demo endpoints enabled on ::1 — allowed
demo endpoints enabled on empty host — allowed
demo endpoints enabled on non-local host without ack — blocked
blocked error is safe and deterministic
blocked error contains no secrets tokens or exploit details
blocked error contains no endpoint paths
blocked error references acknowledgement env var
explicit ack (true/1/yes) allows non-local demo endpoints
arbitrary strings not accepted as ack
ack present but demo disabled — still safe
local mode with local host — not blocked
test mode with local host — not blocked
local mode with non-local host — still blocked (mode-independent)
startup_ok and startup_errors patterns preserved
health and readiness endpoints accessible
scope guard — allowed file set only
no migration files changed
no GitHub workflow files changed
no dependency manifest changes
no OpenAPI changes

findings.description: Demo endpoints enabled with non-local host binding exposed without block in local runtime mode
findings.resolution: Added demo_endpoint_public_exposure_errors() guard enforced in server.run() regardless of runtime mode

next_recommended_step: GL-191: Public Developer Experience Polish Pack
non_goals: demo endpoint restriction beyond host binding
